description:
B4a's pull.rs landed at 302 lines (cap is 299/300) because the pre-commit hook's non-zero exit was masked by a bash pipeline. Split tests/inline-cfg-mod into a sibling pull_tests.rs included via #[path]; the module pattern mirrors the forge plugin's pr_api.rs / pr_api_tests.rs (in spirit — pr_api.rs is single-file in the forge plugin today, but the split idiom is in use elsewhere in the repo and is the canonical fix per balls's file_decomposition_convention.

ACCEPTANCE: scripts/check-line-lengths.sh exits 0; coverage stays at 100%; tests still pass.
title: Split pull.rs: lift tests to sibling file to fit the 300-line cap
